prompt: Create a realistic fashion comparison image showing three full-body young East Asian women standing side by side, each wearing elegant traditional Hanfu-inspired outfits with layered robes and floral embroidery. Use a square 1:1 canvas. The three figures are evenly spaced in a triptych composition, all facing forward with hands gently clasped at the waist, feet visible, calm formal posture, and softly blurred/obscured faces. Count exactly 3 outfits: left outfit is warm ivory outer robe with very wide sleeves, white embroidered collar panel, pale beige floral skirt with blue-and-white blossoms near the hem; center outfit is pale powder-blue outer robe with wide sleeves, white embroidered collar panel, cream skirt with delicate floral sprigs and horizontal trim, small hanging waist ornament; right outfit is creamy white outer robe with wide sleeves, embroidered collar panel, dusty pink pleated floral skirt with blue-and-white blossoms near the hem. All three have neat black updo hairstyles with center parting, traditional hair buns, floral hairpins, and dangling earrings. Background: outdoor courtyard setting with shallow depth of field; left and center behind soft green foliage, right behind a dark reddish-brown wall, gray stone pavement underfoot. Lighting is natural, soft, and diffuse, with realistic fabric texture, embroidery detail, gentle folds, muted pastel colors, and editorial catalog photography quality. Keep the image clean, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no props beyond clothing and hair ornaments.
